sentence: हे लोक गोंयांत, महाराष्ट्राच्या कोंकण विभागांत, कर्नाटकांत तशेंच केरळातूय थोडेकडेन वसल्यात.
english_translation: These people live in Goa, the Konkan division of Maharashtra, Karnataka, as well as in a few places in Kerala.
